name: SEAL Authority Levels
principle: Every ecosystem entity has # identity. SEAL grants scoped authority to that identity. Final action requires sufficient SEAL, valid scope and proof.

levels.name: consequential
levels.authority: actions affecting records, rights, money, certification, access, status or another #

levels.name: constitutional
levels.authority: structural, ecosystem-wide, sovereign, emergency, governance or irreversible change

finalityRules: No action becomes final without actor #, subject #, sufficient SEAL, valid scope and proof.
A # may hold different SEAL levels in different products, swarms, roles and jurisdictions.
Delegated SEAL cannot exceed the issuer's authority.
Expired, revoked, challenged or out-of-scope SEAL cannot authorize final action.
AI and machine SEAL must trace to an accountable human or organization #.
SEAL 4 requires multi-party approval and cannot be granted by a single automated agent.
